account_deleted.body: The Splex account for {email} has been permanently deleted. Your profile, login credentials, and devices have been removed.
account_deleted.history: Your past shared expenses stay visible so balances remain readable for other people.
account_deleted.recreate: You can create a new account at any time at {frontend_url}. It will not reconnect to your old data.
account_deleted.subject: Your Splex account has been deleted
account_deleted.unexpected: If you did not request this deletion, contact your Splex administrator immediately.
footer_ignore: If this wasn't you, you can ignore this email.
magic.expiry: This link and code expire in {minutes_valid} minutes.
magic.instructions: Use this link or the code below to sign in.
retention_warning.body: The Splex account for {email} has been inactive for a while.
retention_warning.cta: Log in to keep my account
retention_warning.immediate: If you want to delete the account right away, sign in and open your account settings.
retention_warning.subject: Your Splex account will be deleted soon
retention_warning.summary: If you do nothing, your profile, login credentials, and devices will be removed. Solo groups will be deleted; shared expenses remain as an unregistered placeholder.
